description: Use the test_driven optimizer to improve the complaint-generator adversarial complainant/mediator loop. Target files: /home/barberb/HACC/complaint-generator/complaint_phases/phase_manager.py. Priorities from the latest adversarial batch: Improve coverage: current avg 0.20; Improve empathy: current avg 0.25; Improve information extraction: current avg 0.30. Preserve current behavior while improving router-backed question quality, information extraction, coverage, and patchability.
